intent: A logo cloud: an eyebrow label, then a horizontal strip of client logos. There is no core logo block; idiomatic core is a group (flex, wrap, centered) holding an eyebrow paragraph and the logo images directly. CAPABILITY GAP: a flat row of images currently mis-detects as core/columns with empty columns (the image is consumed as the column cell and not emitted) — this fixture surfaces that bug. coblocks/logos is the cleaner third-party form.
